---
name: Data request
about: Missing flower spot, festival, or farm you'd like added
title: '[DATA] '
labels: data
assignees: ''
---

**What type of data**
- [ ] Flower spot (specify type: wisteria / hydrangea / plum / iris / lavender / sunflower / cosmos / nanohana)
- [ ] Festival / event
- [ ] Fruit farm correction

**Name**
English and Japanese name if known.

**Location**
Prefecture, and GPS coordinates if you have them (Google Maps link works too).

**Official website**
URL of the official site for this spot/event.

**Why it should be included**
e.g. nationally famous, significant attendance, unique variety
